name: scovillain
flavor_texts: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame.
The green head has turned vicious due to the spicy chemicals stimulating its brain. Once it goes on a rampage, there is no stopping it.
text: Scovillain is the Spicy Pepper Pokémon. It is a grass and fire-type Pokémon. Abilities: chlorophyll, insomnia, moody (hidden). Base stats — HP: 65, Attack: 108, Defense: 65, Sp. Atk: 108, Sp. Def: 65, Speed: 75. Evolution line: capsakid → scovillain. Lore: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame. The green head has turned vicious due to the spicy chemicals stimulating its brain. Once it goes on a rampage, there is no stopping it.
